issue: Ecosystem routing works in the sense that the plugin task only returns vendure-plugin and the dashboard task only returns tanstack — but both responses collapse to a single rule and drop the obvious base ecosystem rule (nestjs-graphql for the plugin task; nextjs/react for the dashboard task).
expected: build shipping plugin -> vendure-plugin-patterns + nestjs-graphql-patterns + typescript6-patterns; build dashboard route -> nextjs-patterns + react19-patterns + typescript6-patterns (+ tanstack if mentioned).
rootCauseHypothesis: Mixed-stack repo exacerbates the narrow-collapse: when one rule id matches the task token, the filter returns just that one even though the ecosystem clearly demands its base stack rules.
